lines.translation_en: Later
I finally learned how to love
But sadly, you had already gone far away
Disappeared into the crowd
Later
I finally understood through my tears

lines.translation: Ba'zi odamlarni boy berganingda qaytib kelmaydi
lines.translation_ru: Некоторых людей, раз упустив, уже не вернёшь
lines.translation_en: Some people, once missed, are gone forever
White gardenia petals

lines.translation_ru: Упали на мою синюю плиссированную юбку
lines.translation_en: Fell on my blue pleated skirt
You softly said you love me

lines.translation_ru: Я опустила голову и почувствовала аромат
lines.translation_en: I lowered my head and smelled a fragrance
That eternal night
Midsummer at seventeen

lines.translation_ru: Тот вечер, когда ты поцеловал меня
lines.translation_en: The night you kissed me
Made all my days after that
Whenever I sigh
I always remember the starlight of that day
The love from back then
Why could it be so simple
And why must young people
Hurt the ones they love deeply
On a night like this
Are you the same
Quietly regretting and feeling sad

lines.translation: Agar o'shanda biz shunchalik o'jar bo'lmaganimizda
lines.translation_ru: Если бы тогда мы не были такими упрямыми
lines.translation_en: If back then we hadn't been so stubborn
We wouldn't have so many regrets now
How do you remember me
With a smile or in silence

lines.translation: Bu yillar davomida bor edi birov
lines.translation_ru: За эти годы был ли кто-то
lines.translation_en: Over these years, has there been someone
Who could keep you from feeling lonely
Later
I finally learned how to love
But sadly, you had already gone far away
Disappeared into the crowd
Later
I finally understood through my tears

lines.translation: Ba'zi odamlarni boy berganingda qaytib kelmaydi
lines.translation_ru: Некоторых людей, раз упустив, уже не вернёшь
lines.translation_en: Some people, once missed, are gone forever
How do you remember me
With a smile or in silence

lines.translation: Bu yillar davomida bor edi birov
lines.translation_ru: За эти годы был ли кто-то
lines.translation_en: Over these years, has there been someone
Who could keep you from feeling lonely
Later
I finally learned how to love
But sadly, you had already gone far away
Disappeared into the crowd
Later
I finally understood through my tears

lines.translation: Ba'zi odamlarni boy berganingda qaytib kelmaydi
lines.translation_ru: Некоторых людей, раз упустив, уже не вернёшь
lines.translation_en: Some people, once missed, are gone forever
Later
I finally learned how to love
But sadly, you had already gone far away
Disappeared into the crowd
Later
I finally understood through my tears

lines.translation: Ba'zi odamlarni boy berganingda qaytib kelmaydi
lines.translation_ru: Некоторых людей, раз упустив, уже не вернёшь
lines.translation_en: Some people, once missed, are gone forever
They will never come back again

lines.translation: Bir yigit o'sha qizni sevar edi
lines.translation_en: There was a boy who loved that girl
